findings.description: The OpenAPI contract at `contracts/openapi/v1.yaml` contains stale documentation and examples regarding the failure protocol. Line 26 claims the stream always ends with `RUN_FINISHED` (with an `error` field), and line 59 provides a success-only example that implies `RUN_FINISHED` is the sole terminator. This contradicts the `ag-ui-events.schema.json`, the `ag-ui-emitter` spec, and the upstream `ag_ui.core` Pydantic models, which all use `RUN_ERROR` as the terminal event for failures because the upstream `RunFinishedEvent` does not support an error field.
findings.resolution: Update `contracts/openapi/v1.yaml` (lines 23-26, 46, and 59) to state that the stream ends with either `RUN_FINISHED` (success) or `RUN_ERROR` (failure). Replace the stale 'RUN_FINISHED with error' description with the correct 'RUN_ERROR' semantics. Add a failure-path example to the response body documentation.

findings.description: Task 5.4 in `tasks.md` encodes a stale failure contract in its Goal description. It instructs the implementer to assert that the response stream contains `RUN_FINISHED` with an `error` field, which contradicts the two-phase D8 error mapping requirement in Task 4.6, the `ag-ui-emitter` spec, and the actual JSON schemas.
findings.resolution: Update the Goal of Task 5.4 in `tasks.md` to assert that the response stream emits a terminal `RUN_ERROR` event (not `RUN_FINISHED` with an error field) when the harness fails, aligning with the D8 mapper requirements.

findings.description: Stale architectural prose in `proposal.md` and `design.md` contradicts the Round-2 module-boundary fix (D6). `proposal.md` (line 111) and `design.md` (line 12) still place the `HarnessEvent` union in `src/assistant/transports/ag_ui/`, whereas `work-packages.yaml`, `tasks.md`, and the `harness-adapter` spec have correctly converged on the harness layer (`src/assistant/harnesses/sdk/events.py`).
findings.resolution: Update `proposal.md` (lines 11, 12, 111) and `design.md` (line 12) to correctly place `HarnessEvent` in the harness layer (`src/assistant/harnesses/sdk/events.py`) and include `RUN_ERROR` in all lists of AG-UI protocol events.

findings.description: The `harness-adapter` spec contains a stale regex pattern for the `RunFinished.error` field (`^[A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_.]*$`). This is inconsistent with the corrected regex in both JSON schemas (`^(?:[a-z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*\.)*[A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*$`) which was updated in Round 2 to support dotted lowercase module prefixes (e.g., `asyncio.CancelledError`).
findings.resolution: Update the regex pattern in the 'Scenario: RunFinished.error field is class-name-only when populated' section of `specs/harness-adapter/spec.md` to match the JSON schemas.
